findings.title: No subcontractor_invoices table
findings.description: Procore's Subcontractor Invoicing workflow requires a dedicated table. No such table exists. Frontend tab marked 'coming soon'.

findings.title: No PO/subcontract invoice requisition snapshot table
findings.description: Procore PO Invoices tab shows per-invoice financial snapshots (15 columns). purchase_order_sov_items only stores running totals, not per-period snapshots. No commitment invoice requisition table exists.

findings.title: invoice_status DB enum missing Procore status values
findings.description: DB enum has: draft, pending, approved, paid, void. Procore uses: DRAFT, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE_AND_RESUBMIT (owner); NOT_INVITED, INVITED, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE_AND_RESUBMIT (subcontractor). under_review, revise_and_resubmit, not_invited, invited all missing.

findings.title: owner_invoices.status is unconstrained string not typed enum
findings.description: owner_invoices.status typed as string|null in DB types — not constrained to invoice_status enum. Invalid values can be inserted without error.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing gross_amount column
findings.description: No gross_amount column. Value requires aggregate join from owner_invoice_line_items. Prevents efficient list rendering and sorting.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing net_amount column
findings.description: No net_amount column on owner_invoices.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing paid_amount and no payment tracking table
findings.description: No paid_amount on owner_invoices. No payment recording table for owner invoices.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing percent_complete column
findings.description: No percent_complete field. Must be computed at query time from SOV line items — prevents list sorting.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing company FK for 'Company' column
findings.description: No company_id FK. Must resolve via owner_invoices → prime_contracts → company — extra join on every list query. Also blocks Prime Contract filter.

findings.title: No ERP status column at invoice level for subcontractor invoices
findings.description: erp_status exists at contract level but not invoice level. Invoice-level ERP sync state cannot be tracked.

findings.title: No invitation tracking columns for subcontractor invoice workflow
findings.description: Procore has NOT_INVITED and INVITED statuses. No table tracks whether a subcontractor has been invited to submit for a billing period.

findings.title: billing_periods uses boolean is_closed instead of status enum
findings.description: Uses is_closed boolean instead of status enum. Cannot support future states (draft, locked, under_review).

findings.title: billing_periods missing prime_contract_id FK
findings.description: billing_periods links only to projects. Procore billing periods are scoped to a prime contract. Cannot filter billing periods by prime contract efficiently.
findings.procore_field: list filter — Prime Contract + Billing Period

findings.title: purchase_order_sov_items missing stored_materials per line
findings.description: No stored_materials column per SOV line. Only total at contract_billing_periods level.
findings.procore_field: po_invoices — Total Completed and Stored To Date

findings.title: No invoice_position (requisition sequence number) column
findings.description: Procore has Invoice Position — sequential system-generated number per contract invoice history. No equivalent exists.

findings.title: billing_periods missing name/label column
findings.description: No name column — display names must be constructed at query time from date columns.
findings.procore_field: list filter — Billing Period select display name

findings.title: Two overlapping billing period tables with no enforced relationship
findings.description: billing_periods (project-scoped) and contract_billing_periods (prime_contract-scoped) overlap with no FK enforcing consistency.

findings.title: No index on owner_invoices.status
findings.description: Status column has no index. Only existing index is on prime_contract_id. Status-filtered queries will full scan.

findings.title: No index on owner_invoices.billing_period_id
findings.description: billing_period_id FK has no index. Combined with DB-018, common list queries will full scan.

findings.title: subcontract_sov_items missing unit_cost, quantity, uom columns
findings.description: purchase_order_sov_items has all three; subcontract_sov_items does not. Inconsistent schema between PO and subcontract SOV items.

findings.title: owner_invoice_line_items missing quantity, unit_cost, uom columns
findings.description: Only has approved_amount, description, category. Cannot represent AIA G702/G703 unit-cost breakdowns.
findings.procore_field: po_invoices — SOV line item unit cost detail

findings.title: owner_invoices missing due_date column
findings.description: Has period_start and period_end but no due_date. acumatica_ar_invoices has due_date but owner_invoices does not.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing billing_date column
findings.description: No billing_date distinct from period start/end dates.

findings.title: billing_periods missing created_by audit column
findings.description: Has closed_by but no created_by for audit trail.

findings.title: No invoice_attachments table
findings.description: PO invoices list has Attachments column per row. No attachments junction table for invoices.
